<!-- Generated by releases/scripts/generate-plugin-reference.mjs. Do not edit by hand. -->
Provider component that exposes the React client context.

# Declaration

```js
export function DartwicProvider({
    children,
    implementHeartbeat = true,
    logger = console,
    onError = null,
})
```

# Props

| Prop | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `children` | `ReactNode` | Wrapped app subtree. |
| `implementHeartbeat` | `boolean` | Enable TEMPEST heartbeat behavior. |
| `logger` | `object` | Logger passed to the underlying web client. |
| `onError` | `function | null` | Optional error callback. |

# Context Value

| Field | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `client` | Underlying `TempestWebClient` instance. |
| `channels` | Current live channel map with stale-state decoration. |
| `connect` | Connect to the engine and validate runtime compatibility. |
| `disconnect` | Disconnect and clear telemetry state. |
| `operation` | Send a TEMPEST operation request. |
| `bindTelemetryHandler` | Bind a telemetry handler. |
| `unbindTelemetryHandler` | Unbind a telemetry handler. |
| `sendTelemetry` | Send telemetry through the client. |
| `addChannelToTelemetry` | Subscribe one channel to live telemetry. |
| `addChannelsToTelemetry` | Subscribe multiple channels to live telemetry. |
| `removeChannelFromTelemetry` | Unsubscribe one channel. |
| `removeChannelsFromTelemetry` | Unsubscribe multiple channels. |
| `queryChannelRange` | Query one channel over a time range. |
| `upsertChannel` | Write a value to a channel path. |

# Behavior

- Performs runtime compatibility checks after connect.
- Tracks desired live telemetry subscriptions across reconnects.
- Decorates live channel data with stale-state calculation.

# Source

- Public React client package source.
